decisions.summary: Single-PR scope accepted for existing PR create artifact refresh.
decisions.reason: The diff is one cohesive lifecycle repair: Story/Spec/Architecture define the same PR create existing-refresh contract, src/pr-manager.js implements the fallback, and test/vibepro-cli.test.js covers both refresh and head-mismatch failure. Split plan from pr prepare is single_pr_ok, and the review owner is gate_evidence for artifact freshness, command reliability, and PR lifecycle handoff. Splitting docs, implementation, and tests would remove the traceability needed to prove the artifact lifecycle behavior.
